title: Spot The Surge
summary:
Main
Charlie Grey of Tankers International explains why the window to capitalise on the VLCC spot market is opening rapidly, demanding timely and strategic action. By Charlie Grey
The very large crude carrier (VLCC) market is undergoing significant changes, driven by rising geopolitical tensions and a volatile market. In this environment, global tanker dynamics are shifting fast, and for VLCC owners, a clear opportunity is emerging.
